title: Video edit script
description: The plan returned from the Claude chat and dropped into work/<video_name>/script.json. Stage 4 reads this to cut, caption, narrate, and export the video.

title.description: Short human title for the finished clip.

keep_segments.description: Segments of the SOURCE video to keep, in final playback order. The output is these concatenated top-to-bottom.

start.description: Start time in the source video (seconds).

end.description: End time in the source video (seconds).

note.description: Optional: why this shot was kept.

voiceover.description: Narration lines spoken over the FINAL edited timeline. Rendered to speech with edge-tts. If 'start' is omitted, lines play back-to-back from 0.

start.description: When this line begins on the final timeline (seconds).

voice.description: edge-tts voice name (e.g. en-US-AriaNeural). Falls back to config default if omitted.

captions.description: On-screen text burned onto the FINAL edited timeline.

track.description: Filename in assets/music/, or null to auto-pick / omit.

gain_db.description: Music level relative to voiceover; negative ducks it (e.g. -18).

post_captions.description: Per-platform post text used at publish time. Include only the platforms you post to.
